log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kenku — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kenku — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kenku — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 34 damage. Kenku — Winged Striker HP: 33/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Kenku — Winged Striker --- HP: 33/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.

ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.

══ ROUND 10 ══
--- Kenku — Winged Striker --- HP: 33/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person

Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 16] FAIL! 3 psychic damage. HP: 175/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 175/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kenku — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kenku — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 damage. Kenku — Winged Striker HP: 24/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Kenku — Winged Striker HP: 6/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
══ ROUND 11 ══
--- Kenku — Winged Striker --- HP: 6/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (6/67). Going invisible for survival.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Kenku — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 175/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kenku — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kenku — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Kenku — Winged Striker HP: -13/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
